description: Improve the GitHub PR body created by baro with rich stats, story table, review info, and branding

userStories.description: In executor.rs run_executor(), add mutable counters review_cycles (u32) and review_fixes_applied (u32). Update run_review_for_level to return (u32, u32) representing (cycles_run, total_fixes_applied). After each call to run_review_for_level, accumulate into the counters. The function currently returns nothing (unit). Change its return type to (u32, u32) and return the accumulated cycle count and fix count from the for loop. At the call site (around line 1002), capture the return and add to the accumulators. Also compute sequential_time as the sum of all story duration_secs from current_prd.user_stories in the finalize block. These variables must be accessible in the finalize async block where the PR body is built.
userStories.title: Track review cycles and fixes in run_executor

userStories.description:
In executor.rs, replace the PR body building block (lines 1103-1125) with the new format. The new body should be:

1) A one-line summary: the goal text from current_prd.description (first sentence or full text if short).

2) A '## Stories' section with a markdown table: | ID | Title | Duration | Status | where Status is 'Done' if passes==true, 'Skipped' otherwise. Duration should be formatted as e.g. '45s' or '2m 30s'. Include ALL stories (not just completed ones).

3) A '## Stats' section with bullet points: total wall time (formatted nicely), time saved with parallelism (sequential_time - wall_time), speedup multiplier (sequential_time / wall_time as 1.0x format), files created, files modified, stories completed/total, stories skipped.

4) A '## Review' section noting how many review cycles ran and how many fixes were auto-applied. Use the review_cycles and review_fixes_applied variables from S1.

5) At the bottom: a horizontal rule then 'Built with [baro](https://www.npmjs.com/package/baro-ai) - Background Agent Runtime Orchestrator'.

Format everything as clean GitHub-flavored markdown. Make sure cargo build passes with zero warnings.
userStories.title: Rewrite PR body with rich markdown format
